MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-21-2020 IN 206, PLAINTIFF LYNETTE BREMER'S MOTIONFOR PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). MARK WEBB, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURT CALL. PAUL CALEO, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT VIA COURT CALL. JUDGE FENG MAKES A DISCLOSURE THAT HE KNOWS MR. WEBB PROFESSIONALLY BUT DON'T MEET SOCIALLY AND THAT HE WILL NOT BE PREJUDICE OR BIAS TO EITHER SIDE. THERE WERE NO OBJECTIONS BY THE PARTIES. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT DENIES PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 1/19/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. MR. WEBB TO GIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-29-2020 IN 206, CROSS-DEFENDANT ELI LILLY AND COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY MARK WEBB, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; MEGAN RODGERS, ESQ. & SYLVIA HUANG, ESQ. FOR MOVING PARTY; PAUL CALEO, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT WALGREENS CO. ARGUED AND THE COURT FOUND GOOD CAUSE AND GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 01/19/21 IS CONTINUED TO 10/04/21 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE COURT DID NOT CONSIDER PLAINTIFF'S SUR-REPLY. THE COURT DID NOT ENTERTAIN ANY BIFURCATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MS. RODGERS TO SERVE ORDER. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

The verified application of Michael X. Imbroscio to appear as counsel pro hac vice to cross-defendant Eli Lilly and Company is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.
